howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from ticker to institutional-grade research
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter a stock symbol, ETF, or sector. We pull real-time data from Yahoo Finance, FMP, and Finnhub.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI engine combines market data, news, insider trades, and financials to generate a professional research report in seconds.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get a BUY/HOLD/SELL verdict, SWOT matrix, price targets, Graham valuation, and exportable research reports.

footer.text: T&N Signal is an AI-driven research tool. All information is generated by large language models and third-party market providers. This does not constitute financial advice. Always consult a professional advisor before allocating capital.
